h0b8aff3cg2d1eg4b41g8631ga8e09eb3796f: Gentlemen - contain yourselves. This quarrel sours our feast. Besides - taste like pork!
h9a2b8f0fga63ag464fgb7a6gb906f4daddbd: Brothers, look here. I have eyed yet another tiefling prize. Fortune favours our bellies!
hec440854g4c81g4f50g8994g25274c387338: Brothers, look here. I have eyed yet another prize. Fortune favours our bellies!
hcd45b1c0g54e1g4a53g88fegfa11fbf5e2a7: Stranger: be you friend or food? The mark is Her measure: show us the brand of the Absolute.
h040e7de5g436dg4d25g99e7g372d1a96df51: You speak with an eloquence unusual to your kind.
h1964b7fbgbfc1g453dgb088g0ccf9e1898d7: You're quite eloquent for an ogre.
h8451dc61gcc08g469dga8ffg025456a1faa4: Am I not astonishing? A robust diet makes for a shrewd mind, you see. I am a gourmand...
h95f18affgfa82g49f4g943bgdd91d3fadab2: ... and you, a delicacy - were I so lucky.
hea2bd067gea3eg4763gbab6geca1d1d1899d: ... and you, a delicacy - unless you bear the mark, of course.
h0a667aa2gc96bg4b2fgb7e7ga9a0cc17dc92: I see it. How regrettable, that your meat must go unsavoured.
h2ed20332gbd43g4b81g93cfg28048a7ee081: You are quite the articulate ogre.
h954ff6ccgde44g48dcg8a7eg3e4419c83e23: I notice you don't bear a brand of your own.
h09d34491ge712g4c6ag981fg117fa0ca1637: I've no use for the Absolute - or any god. I follow two masters only: gluttony and greed.
h00ac4435ge703g459dg8dfcg1443b6050899: The goblins understand my appetites. They sate my hunger for gold...
h06041c3cg3be7g48c3gb046g9cd96d906bb9: ... and the rest sate my hunger for meat.
hec40921dg83cfg4717g9784g92739693d4e6: Boss goblin give gold. We check brand. Good deal!
h5cce3192g7e77g4d0fgbc88g86500aba66c5: Forget goblins. You should be fighting for me.
h586e0b5eg1416g4b0agaa73g5b441fa5b7e9: I am by all accounts a student of higher commerce and extortion.
ha75c0c0ag1c3fg4fa1g8038g35e323ee310d: I'll give you [6057ad05-9492-4630-9f0a-be548b134c54] gold if I can call you into battle.
hcf79ec7fgf321g4444gb014g1cdc8506e88d: A serenade to my ears, and a boon to my belly. We've a bargain, my tasty kibble!
h17ffe8f6g2c3dg4452g82a5g33469bbca8d7: Take my bonehorn. One blow, and the ground will quake with my family name.
h758ac11cgc766g494fg904cged58bf0e9b90: Use it when the need arises - and never a moment before.
hc84297e9g7679g4870ga906g9b61bd141734: Ogre kill everyone around! Then ogre eats them!
hf555e85bg8eebg44f0g8704g14a5c03dc76e: Well spoken. Indeed, ogre 'kill everyone around'.
hf9a375bbg085ag4694g8896gc8f3c3c5ab58: We will keep close. When you are ready, sound the horn.
h8806a6a3g4e30g4f40g870eg75244746400d: Take my bonehorn. One blow, and... just a moment. It's been thieved - and I know the culprit.
h5de27087gd1a7g481egb791g95c9bc173fc1: I'll give you [463b0f43-5410-412d-aba3-875cf81c38ca] gold - after you fight for me.
hb5e73fc4ga1a1g4d8cga27dgec2f6033a057: [463b0f43-5410-412d-aba3-875cf81c38ca] - to be paid once the killing's done.
he6320167gcea2g4b8eg9ec0g66adefcc9edb: A twice-played serenade to my ears, my tasty kibble. We have a bargain!
h93ca8dd8g6ebfg4a24g8091g65107e8292da: Come, now. An ogre feasts not on promises.
haa0014e3gaa28g4c77gaf93g4fe57be029c1: I'll pay you in the flesh of the fallen - you'll have your fill.
h8244a41dgf1dag4525gaaefg5020dc3049d7: A brilliant notion, and a boon to my aching belly. We have a deal, my tasty kibble!
h2f3a1b7fg50ceg448fgbbe7g04cfb2f3eded: A slip of the tongue - you meant to make a better offer, surely.
h3b261047gb371g4574g8954g14e88cff5e99: I'll pay you in the flesh of the fallen - you'll have your fill.
h7dbed67fg0fceg42d7gbd9eg615f89d65af7: I've changed my mind. The offer is off the table.
h747fd5f4g6685g46a2g89ebg34c6b1f982c3: Oh, but you do love to tease.
h6aadb9d6g6fe4g4316gaa70g202f4d295422: I know of your kind, but you're among the first I've seen.
ha24eb8abga445g4985gb07dgf0293a62dd2d: I've seen few other ogres in these parts.
he472953eg9038g4f37ga182ga7e3c2112323: Mm - your candor makes you all the more enticing.
habbbe592g0ae5g4d40gaeb2gf267fe4da010: We follow the scents of blood and gold to all lands fertile, friend.
h7c9733ddg322dg43d5g9af8g89a5224e6d3b: And this land proves particularly... fruitful.
hb1d9c1e2gc8e1g4c5aga267g53c8ce4554e7: Alas - not so much as a nibble.
h70aed787g2ae3g4971gb7e9g55598ab8a9ae: How regrettable. Tell me, sweet creature: does your flesh taste as honeyed as I could hope for?
hc2bc0485g527ag4134g829fg8f9a9cd6a14b: Unh. You wound me, creature. I can hardly resist you.
h754f65c2g638fg4b7bgae8bg28b76016c129: I'll leave that to your imagination.
h2d89f247g547ag4056gbed9g09ac52c5ec34: I'll do you one better - I'm one of the Absolute's chosen disciples.
h98c064cbg7780g44dbg9470g6664d67337da: Indeed? How regrettable, that your meat must go unsavoured.
h6c2feb76g7f12g4e8ega1aeg6a1838839c10: How regrettable. Tell me, sweet creature: does your flesh taste as honeyed as I could hope for?
h7347747fg90dcg4a09g9e97g3d572dd055fe: I expect more than your word. Show me your flesh.
h1a3eed0fg0e7cg4a14ga8f3gcc92db8eef19: Flash your arm at him. There you are. You could see the brand, could you not?
ha0216faag1fbdg4129g8807geec3c52395f5: Yes, yes - the mark is unmistakable. How regrettable, that your meat must go unsavoured.
h570bb2e7gb954g4031ga624g57b7f9170893: Yes, yes - the mark is unmistakable. Tell me, sweet creature: does your flesh taste as honeyed as I could hope for?
ha844f422g11dcg468dga5ceg5c58c4b3dd16: Ha! Did you expect The Enlightened to fall for such a crude ruse?
hea9637f5g6d6bg4923g87f8g5f1f6edd42f9: Do not test the Absolute's finest, ogre. You would not survive Her wrath.
h29a0bd6cg51c2g483fgba3eg42df96de89c1: Spoken with the confidence only a True Soul could muster!
hd081059dgee9ag44f2ga9c9ga70c44b38113: How regrettable, that your meat must go unsavoured.
h93d82c70g2436g454bgbdf5g7096fd24d10c: Tell me, sweet creature: does your flesh taste as honeyed as I could hope for?
h91b63038g7201g421dg96e3gc04aa0dd4b76: She scampered in from the east, calling for 'Yul'. A pet, no doubt.
hd4b6be31g85bfg44b0g967dg0b2ffac73663: The green earth bless us, she bore no mark. Those horns - mm, mm. Such cartilaginous crunch!
h5fbae303gca01g4787ga7d4g5e1fb7c48861: Now let's see that mark, lest I give in to my cravings.
h68b82903g20adg4541g9f8bg3f3f38582129: These horns are not yours to take! Attack.
